headline: A Look At General Dynamics (GD) Valuation After Recent Share Price Softness And Strong One Year Returns
summary: Key business mix and revenue profile General Dynamics (GD) sits in the large cap aerospace and defense space, with a market value of about US$93.8b and reported annual revenue of US$52.6b and net income of US$4.2b. The company reports through four major segments, each serving different parts of defense and aerospace demand. This can matter for how resilient earnings and cash flows feel across different budget cycles and contract types. Aerospace generated US$13.1b of revenue, tied largely to...

headline: General Dynamics Corporation (GD) Secures $15.38 Billion Navy Contract Modification
summary: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) is among the 10 Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires. On March 18, the Department of War announced that the company was awarded a $15.38 billion Navy contract modification involving the Columbia-class submarines. According to the press release, the defense contractor’s subsidiary, General Dynamics Electric Boat Corp., […]
